category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Ghana market.

title.en: China-to-Ghana LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入加纳：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入迦納：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Ghana market-access requirements: Ghana Standards Authority (GSA) mandatory conformity assessment and destination inspection, GS standards adopting IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471, Energy Commission appliance labelling and MEPS, and NCA type approval for wireless smart lighting, versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与加纳市场准入要求差距对照：加纳标准局（GSA）强制合格评定与目的地检验、采用 IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 的 GS 标准、能源委员会电器标签与 MEPS，以及无线智能照明的 NCA 型号核准，与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與迦納市場准入要求差距對照：迦納標準局（GSA）強制合格評定與目的地檢驗、採用 IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 的 GS 標準、能源委員會電器標籤與 MEPS，以及無線智能照明的 NCA 型號核准，與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Ghana law, GSA conformity-assessment and destination-inspection requirements, GS/IEC standards adoption, Energy Commission labelling and MEPS thresholds, and NCA type-approval obligations with qualified professionals and the in-country importer before shipment to Tema or Takoradi.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在向特马（Tema）或塔科拉迪（Takoradi）出货前，应与合格专业人士及在加纳本地进口商核验现行加纳法律、GSA 合格评定与目的地检验要求、GS/IEC 标准采用情况、能源委员会标签与 MEPS 阈值，以及 NCA 型号核准义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在向特馬（Tema）或塔科拉迪（Takoradi）出貨前，應與合格專業人士及在迦納本地進口商核驗現行迦納法律、GSA 合格評定與目的地檢驗要求、GS/IEC 標準採用情況、能源委員會標籤與 MEPS 閾值，以及 NCA 型號核准義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Ghana must meet Ghana Standards Authority (GSA) mandatory conformity-assessment / destination-inspection requirements for regulated lamps and luminaires; demonstrate electrical safety against GS standards adopting IEC 60598 / IEC 62560; meet Energy Commission appliance labelling and minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) requirements where the product is a regulated lighting appliance; obtain NCA (National Communications Authority) type approval for any wireless/smart lighting functionality; and route the shipment through an in-country importer for destination inspection at Tema or Takoradi. Ghana's grid is 230 V / 50 Hz — the 50 Hz frequency matches China but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V, so product rating must be verified. Note: Ghana does not operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS, battery, or outdoor-noise regime, so EU RoHS-style substance restrictions do not map across — China GB/T 26572 and GS/IEC safety standards are the relevant baselines. None of these Ghana obligations are satisfied by existing CCC certification alone.
answer_first.zh: 出口加纳的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：满足加纳标准局（GSA）对受管制灯及灯具的强制合格评定/目的地检验要求；依据采用 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 的 GS 标准证明电气安全；在产品属于受管制照明电器时满足能源委员会电器标签及最低能效标准（MEPS）要求；为任何无线/智能照明功能取得 NCA（国家通信管理局）型号核准；并通过加纳本地进口商安排货物在特马或塔科拉迪进行目的地检验。加纳电网为 230 V / 50 Hz——50 Hz 频率与中国一致，但标称电压与中国 220 V 不同，故须核验产品额定值。注意：加纳不设欧盟式横向 RoHS、电池或户外噪声制度，因此欧盟 RoHS 式物质限制无法对应映射——中国 GB/T 26572 及 GS/IEC 安全标准为相关基线。上述加纳义务均不被现有 CCC 认证单独所涵盖。
answer_first.zht: 出口迦納的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：滿足迦納標準局（GSA）對受管制燈及燈具的強制合格評定/目的地檢驗要求；依據採用 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 的 GS 標準證明電氣安全；在產品屬於受管制照明電器時滿足能源委員會電器標籤及最低能效標準（MEPS）要求；為任何無線/智能照明功能取得 NCA（國家通信管理局）型號核准；並通過迦納本地進口商安排貨物在特馬或塔科拉迪進行目的地檢驗。迦納電網為 230 V / 50 Hz——50 Hz 頻率與中國一致，但標稱電壓與中國 220 V 不同，故須核驗產品額定值。注意：迦納不設歐盟式橫向 RoHS、電池或戶外噪聲制度，因此歐盟 RoHS 式物質限制無法對應映射——中國 GB/T 26572 及 GS/IEC 安全標準為相關基線。上述迦納義務均不被現有 CCC 認證單獨所涵蓋。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Each release cycle and on material regulatory change
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. GSA conformity-assessment scope, GS/IEC standard editions, Energy Commission MEPS thresholds, and NCA type-approval scope must be re-verified against current official Ghana sources on each review cycle. Where Ghana lacks an EU-style horizontal regime (RoHS, battery, outdoor-noise), this must be stated plainly rather than implied by analogy.
